name: Easy, Excellent BBQ Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler (or a hot oven). Rinse off racks of ribs and dry well. Sprinkle liberally with Cavender's Greek Seasoning.
2. If you have time, let the seasoned ribs sit for about an hour. Place them in the broiler to brown slightly on one side; this allows excess fat to cook off. Turn the ribs over and brown the other side.
3. Place the racks of ribs in a crockpot standing up. Lean the racks against each other or use skewers so only the very end rests at the bottom. Ensure they do not touch the sides. Cook on low for about 8 hours until extremely tender, then refrigerate overnight to firm up.
4. When ready to serve, baste ribs with BBQ sauce and heat over a hot grill or in an oven, turning and basting with sauce. Cut into serving pieces and serve immediately.
